title: Day 06 Reflection
description: Custom hooks are how seniors avoid copy-paste — document what you extracted before machine coding tomorrow.

prompts.question: Describe your useDebounce implementation. What goes in the effect dependency array and why?
How does debounced search change behavior compared to Day 04 submit-only search?
What responsive changes did you make to sidebar and navbar? What breaks below 768px without them?
Which logic is now a custom hook vs staying in the component? Would you extract anything else?
